content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No blocking findings. The current code already enforces the PromptReview contract: `drift_still_satisfies_requirements` rejects any `effective_min_override` for `StageId::PromptReview` (with exact error), and the resume call path only supplies an override for completion/final-review cases. A regression test already exists (`prompt_review_drift_requirements_reject_effective_min_override`) validating this invariant.

## Amendments

None.
